system.description:
The esoteric art of combining and creating alchemical and chemical substances. Also covers herbalism and poison-making.
  • Creating a standard toxin using natural ingredients: Alchemy/EDU 8+
  • Brewing a contact poison to apply on sword edges: Alchemy/EDU 10+
system.shortdescr: Creating and combining alchemical substances, herbalism, and poison-making.
